narrative.headline: What 2017 Ford Focus owners report most
narrative.summary: Power train complaints dominate the picture, with owners describing abnormal noises and shifting failures, particularly on inclines. Engine and fuel system problems account for much of the remaining reports, with owners noting stalling, hesitation, and unexpected warning lights. A smaller share of complaints involves engine cooling concerns triggered at startup.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report abnormal noise during operation and failure to properly shift gears when driving up an incline. · 5 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners of the electric variant report the vehicle behaving unexpectedly despite showing a full charge after overnight charging and minimal mileage driven. · 1 fire · 4 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle hesitating and nearly stalling while operating with a partially full fuel tank. · 2 crash · 2 injured
